headline: Pfizer Inc. (PFE) and Astellas Report Positive Phase 3 EV-304 Results for PADCEV Plus Keytruda in Bladder Cancer
summary: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) is among the 13 Most Undervalued S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On February 27, 2026, Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) and Astellas Pharma announced positive Phase 3 EV-304 results for PADCEV, a Nectin-4-directed antibody-drug conjugate, in combination with Keytruda in patients with muscle-invasive bladder cancer eligible for cisplatin-based chemotherapy. Perioperative enfortumab vedotin plus […]
